states.name: declared
states.description: Sync relationship/policy exists but has not been activated.
entry_requirements: Endpoints, direction, cursor and conflict policies exist.

states.name: active
states.description: New Sync Runs may be requested under current authority/policy.

states.name: paused
states.description: New automatic Runs are paused while relationship/history/cursors remain.
entry_requirements: Pause reason and treatment of running work exist.

states.name: degraded
states.description: Relationship remains usable only for a reduced scope or requires rescan/manual review.

states.name: revoked
states.description: Relationship cannot authorize new Sync Runs.
entry_requirements: Revocation and active-run/credential handling are reconciled.

states.name: retired
states.description: Relationship is retained historically after planned replacement/end.
entry_requirements: No new work/cursors are authorized and successor/retention is recorded.

required_preconditions: Endpoint authority, capability and cursor strategy are current.
New Runs blocked and current work policy retained.
Cursor gap, endpoint/capability loss or policy limitation is retained.
New work blocked and credentials/running work reconciled.
Successor/retention and no new authority are recorded.
